name: field-group
visual_summary: The field-group component is a container element that groups related form fields together. It is commonly used in registration or login forms to keep inputs organized. Developers can use this component when they need to present a set of fields with a clear label and clear separation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-group
Description: The field-group component is a container element that groups related form fields together. It is commonly used in registration or login forms to keep inputs organized. Developers can use this component when they need to present a set of fields with a clear label and clear separation.
Style: default, minimal
Interactions: not-animated, not-hover
Tags: form, grouping, input-organization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
